attributes.action: No British Participation in U.S. Military Action Against Iran
attributes.additional_details:
We, the undersigned, call on the UK Government to unequivocally reject any involvement in a military attack on Iran led by the United States.
The potential for a new military conflict in the Middle East poses significant risks, not only to the security of the region but to the safety and well-being of British soldiers, citizens, and global stability. Our nation’s involvement in such a conflict would not only be morally unjustifiable but would also carry a high financial and human cost.
attributes.background: Prevent the Participation of British Troops in a U.S. Military Attack on Iran

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
